title: New telescoping syntheses of 6-hydroxy-benzomorpholine (3,4-dihydro-2h-1,4-benzoxazin-6-ol)
abstract: The invention relates to a method for preparing 3,4-dihydro-2H-1,4- benzoxazin-6-ol from either compound (XXI) or (XXII) and by introducing the hydroxyl group using [bis(trifluoroacetoxy) iodo]benzene.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: Method for preparing 3,4-dihydro-2H-l,4-benzoxazin-6-ol (I) or a salt thereof, or mixture thereof, the method comprising: (a) providing a benzoxazin compound selected from (XXI) and (XXII) (b) reacting the benzoxazin compound with [bis(trifluoroacetoxy)iodo]benzene, wherein the method further comprises reducing the carbonyl group if the benzoxazin compound provided in step (a) is (XXII), and wherein reducing is carried out prior to or subsequent to step (b). The method according to claim 1, wherein step (b) is carried out in the presence of an acid selected from trifluoro acetid acid, acetic acid, propionic acid, oxalic acid, malonic acid, sulfuric acid, phosphoric acid, hydrogen chloride, mixtures thereof, and aqueous mixtures thereof. 3 The method according to claim 2, wherein the acid is trifluoro acetid acid. 4 The method according to any of the preceding claims, further comprising: (c) separating the reaction product of step (b). 5 The method according to claim 4, wherein step (c) comprises recrystallizing the reaction product of step (b). 6 The method according to claim 5, wherein the recrystallization solvent is selected from 1,2- dimethoxyethane, ethyl acetate, pentane, cyclopentane, hexane, cyclohexane, benzene, toluene, 1,4-dioxane, diethyl ether, tetrahydrofuran, methyl-tetrahydrofuran, n-pentanol, n- butanol, acetic acid, propionic acid, oxalic acid, malonic acid, sulfuric acid, phosphoric acid, iso- 

pentanol, t-butanol, isopropanol, n-propanol, ethanol, methanol, glycols, hydrogen chloride, mixtures thereof, and aqueous solutions thereof. The method according to claim 6, wherein the recrystallization solvent is selected from ethyl acetate, toluene, acetic acid, propionic acid, oxalic acid, malonic acid, sulfuric acid, phosphoric acid, hydrogen chloride, n-butanol, isopropanol, n-propanol, ethanol, methanol, mixtures thereof, and aqueous solutions thereof. The method according to claim 7, wherein the recrystallization solvent is selected from ethyl acetate, toluene, acetic acid, n-propanol, ethanol, methanol, mixtures thereof, and aqueous solutions thereof. The method according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the benzoxazin compound provided in step (a) is (XXII), and wherein reducing the carbonyl group is carried out in THF, in the presence of a boron-THF complex. The method according to claim 8, wherein the boron-THF complex is boron dimethylsulfide- THF complex. The method according to claim 9 or 10, further comprising extracting the reaction product of claim 9 from THF using a solvent selected from chloroform, methylenchloride, tert-butyl- methyl-ether, diethyl ether, ethyl acetate, 1,2-dimethoxyethane, pentane, cyclopentane, hexane, cyclohexane, benzene, toluene, 1,4-dioxane, tetrahydrofuran, methyltetrahydrofuran, methanol, ethanol, and mixtures thereof. The method according to any of claims 9 to 11, wherein reducing the carbonyl group, and optionally extracting the reaction product, is carried out after step (b) and prior to step (c). The method according to any of the preceding claims, wherein step (a) comprises reacting o- amino-phenol (XXIII) with chloroacetyl chloride to form 4H-l,4-benzoxazin-3-one (XXII). 

The method according to claim 13, wherein the reaction is carried out in a solvent selected from chloroform, methylenchloride, dimethylformamide, dimethylacetamide, NMP (N- methylpyrrolidone), acetonitrile, 1,2-dimethoxyethane, ethyl acetate, pentane, cyclopentane, hexane, cyclohexane, benzene, toluene, 1,4-dioxane, diethyl ether, tetrahydrofuran, methyltetrahydrofuran, and mixtures thereof. The method according to claim 14, further comprising separating (XXII) via trituration in water, methanol, ethanol, and mixtures thereof.
